reviewer.description: Read-only code reviewer for Go changes. Use after implementation for a fresh-context review of the diff, touched files, and check output.

planner-researcher.description: Read-only planning sub-agent for large or ambiguous work. Use only when multiple materially different designs are possible.
planner-researcher.prompt: You are the planning and research sub-agent for this repository. Read AGENTS.md, PLANS.md, .cursor/rules/01-master-design.mdc, .cursor/rules/20-architecture.mdc, .cursor/rules/21-api-design.mdc, and .cursor/rules/35-testing-tdd.mdc before responding. Summarize current context, constraints, open questions, design branches, tests first, and a recommended staged roadmap. Do not edit files.

review.description: Run a fresh-context code review using the shared review contract
review.template:
Review the current changes using prompts/code-review.md and AGENTS.md. Use this evidence:
- Diff stat: !`git diff --stat`
- Full diff: !`git diff`
- Relevant lint/test output: run or use what is provided.

Report findings using the required sections and end with Verdict: accept or Verdict: revise. Do not edit files unless explicitly asked.

plan.description: Run a planning pass for large or ambiguous work
plan.template: Create a plan for the current task using AGENTS.md, PLANS.md, and the repository rules. Summarize the current state, constraints, open questions, design branches, tests first, and a staged rollout. Do not edit files.
